title: OD and GFP Plate Reader Assay (72 h Measurement)
author: Alba Balletbó
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.8aihsce

steps.title: Prepare the following media and autoclave...
steps.instruction: Prepare the following media and autoclave them according to standard procedures. M9TG Media (Without carbon source): %s %s M9TG Media (0.5% Glycerol): %s %s M9TG Media (2% Glycerol): %s %s M9TG Media (0.5% Succinate and 1mM Leucine): %s %s

steps.title: Set the following variables for the...
steps.instruction: Set the following variables for the BioTek Synergy MX Microplate Reader: - Temperature: Setpoint 37°C Preheat before moving to next step. Start Kinetic [Run 72:00:00, Interval 0:04:20] - Shake: Medium for 0:05 (MM:SS) - Read OD600 : Absorbance Endpoint of full plate Wavelengths: 600 Read Speed: Normal - Read GFP : Fluorescence Endpoint of full plate - Filter Set: Excitation: 488/9,0 Emission: 510/9,0 Optics: Bottom Gain: 100 Read Speed: Normal

steps.title: Grow desired bacteria overnight in a...
steps.instruction: Grow desired bacteria overnight in a 50 ml falcon tub, containing 10 mL M9TG media and grown cultures @ 37 °C , 250 RPM overnight. Luria-Bertani media is also possible to use, but cells must be washed with PBS buffer prior to plate reader experiment because of the high amount of fluorescence from the yeast extract: After overnight incubation, spin cells down at 4700 x G, for 5 min, discard the supernatant and resuspend in 10 ml PBS. Repeat prior steps and resuspension again in PBS.

steps.title: Load 190 µL of the corresponding...
steps.instruction: Load 190 µL of the corresponding buffer in the wells of the 96-well plate and add 10 µL of overnight culture. The amount of buffer and overnight culture will depend on the OD after overnight bacterial cultivation. The amounts present in this protocol where determined by an OD ~0.3. When cell have been grown overnight in LB media, washing steps are require before continuing! ( See step 3 ).

steps.title: Retrieve the data from the computer,...
steps.instruction: Retrieve the data from the computer, correct for the measurements for the OD600 and subtract the autofluorescence from the control sample of all the other samples.
